message:
test(proptest): add 18 serde roundtrip tests for cutover_evidence uncovered types

Covers GoNoGoVerdict, PrerequisiteGate, PrerequisiteEntry, RegressionGuard,
PersistenceProofSuite, PersistenceProof, TestSuiteResult, BenchmarkSummary,
BenchmarkComparison, IncidentRegistry, IncidentRecord, RollbackRehearsalLog,
RollbackRehearsal, SoakOutcome, RiskRegistry, RiskRecord, EvidenceTelemetry,
EvidencePackage. All 18 new tests pass (ce_s01-ce_s18).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
